---
title: "Welcome to AMMNet Hackathon Blog!"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
comments: false
---

Have prepared materials from an AMMnet Hackathon session? [Contribute a post](contribute.qmd) so others can learn from them.
